title: polygala capillaris subsp. perrottetiana
intro: Polygala capillaris subsp. perrottetiana is a sub-species of the Polygala capillaris plant, also known as the 'Honey Flower' or 'Sweet Root', a perennial flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala capillaris subsp. perrottetiana are thought to include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
